steps.title: Express 72x in terms of 8x
steps.content: Notice that $72 = 9 \times 8$. Therefore, we can write $$72x = 9 \times 8x$$

steps.title: Substitute the given value
steps.content: We're given that $8x = 6$. Substituting: $$72x = 9 \times 8x = 9 \times 6 = 54$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
